name: Mami Nanami
description:
**Height:** 158 cm (5'2")

She is a freshman at Nerima University and the ex-girlfriend of [Kazuya Kinoshita](https://anilist.co/character/128105). 
~!She dumped him after only one month. Even though she broke up with him, she can not fathom Kazuya moving on and seizes every moment attempting to sabotage his happiness.!~
